response: You possess a yellow-colored reptile. Place it inside one of these habitats: the fish tank, the bird house, or the reptile cage. Which option should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a yellow reptile. Put it into one of these enclosures: the aquarium, the aviary, or the terrarium. Which one?
